title: The Girl with Massive Melons
overview: Kimio and Nozomi meets the shy Yuuki Makino, who complexes about her own body. Together they team up to help Makino break out of shell.

title: The Clubhouse Ghost
overview: A ghost is haunting the girls’ swim team, and it’s up to Nozomi and Kimio to investigate! Kimio, however, wants nothing to do with this.

title: Our Heartbeats
overview: Sonoda is not happy when Nozomi beats her in a popularity contest.
